text:
Under the moonlight the great redwood trees swayed gently. They whispered secrets to each other during the night.

In a quiet corner of the forest lived a wise little old owl. Every evening he'd glide around singing a lullaby.

The songs were lovely. The owls would listen for hours.

Once a year the owls would gather a great flock together. They'd leave all their birdie treasures. Seeds, berries, even owl pellets.

Sometimes they even sang together.

The next night the owl would glide... *soaring*... across the sky.

But there was something special about that time of year.

It's a lullaby.
